  - Update to 2.0004,1

+++ head/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML/Makefile	Sat Sep 22 19:44:45 2012	(r304717)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	XML-LibXML
-PORTVERSION=	1.97
+PORTVERSION=	2.0004
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
@@ -26,8 +26,6 @@ CONFIGURE_ENV=	XMLPREFIX=${LOCALBASE}
 
 PKGDEINSTALL=	${PKGINSTALL}
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME:C/00.$//}
-
 CONFLICTS=	p5-XML-LibXML-XPathContext-[0-9]* p5-XML-LibXML-Common-[0-9]*
 
 MAN3=		XML::LibXML.3 XML::LibXML::AttributeHash.3 \
